label: Closed Arbs
description: Collapsed list of closed or decayed prediction market arb opportunities with outcome and P&L.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements: ['predictions-trading'] set. 0.3: availableOn: ['predictions'] set. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file — data via usePredictionsData(). 0.6: isLoading guard added (context is synchronous/mock so always false; ready for wiring when context adds the field). 0.7: Empty state present — 'No closed arbs to show' text when closedArbs.length === 0. 0.8: error guard added (context is synchronous/mock so always null; ready for wiring). 0.9: No dead code.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. 0.1: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements: ['predictions-trading'] set. 0.3: availableOn: ['predictions'] set. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file — data via usePredictionsData(). 0.6: isLoading guard added (context is synchronous/mock so always false; ready for wiring when context adds the field). 0.7: Empty state present — 'No closed arbs to show' text when closedArbs.length === 0. 0.8: error guard added (context is synchronous/mock so always null; ready for wiring). 0.9: No dead code.

1.1.note: Widget reads closedArbs exclusively via usePredictionsData() — no inline fetch or direct import. 1.2: predictions-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() and derives scopeStrategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope(). 1.3: Org filter cascades — scopeStrategyIds reduces openPositions/settledPositions when org selected; closedArbs is a UI-computed derived value (active arb decay) not scoped per-org by design. 1.4: clientIds field exists in globalScope but not yet wired into predictions context filtering — same open gap as defi domain. 1.5: Strategy filter wired — scopeStrategyIds.length used to subset open/settled positions; arb stream is market-level data, not strategy-scoped. 1.6: Empty scope arrays return all data (scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 returns full set). 1.7: No reference data in lib/mocks/ consumed by this widget.

findings.description: 0.6/0.8 — No loading or error guard. Added isLoading/error stubs following established DeFi context pattern (synchronous mock, always false/null; ready for wiring when context evolves).
